steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject is more writers from Chad. The phrase including Lamko adds extra information but does not change the subject from plural to singular.

steps.title: Use plural agreement
steps.content: Choice B uses the singular verb is beginning. Choice C uses the singular verb has begun. Choice D uses the singular verb begins. The remaining verb phrase agrees with the plural subject writers and fits the recent-years time frame. The answer is A.
